name: Jihua Group Corporation Limited
summary: Jihua Group Corporation Limited manufactures and distributes military light industrial products in China and internationally. The company offers military police apparel and uniform, and occupational apparel; occupational footwear and shoes; textile Spinning and weaving, and dyeing and printing services; and protective equipment, such as bulletproof helmets and body armors. It is also involved in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of anesthesia machines, medical apparatus, training injury comprehensive therapy apparatus, breast mass comprehensive therapy apparatus, and medical transfer beds; development and production of filter materials and equipment; and research and development of new energy facilities. In addition, the company produces chemical agent-based integrated pharmaceuticals, including neurological and psychiatric agents, cerebrovascular and cardiovascular agents, endocrine agents, and antimicrobial and other agents; and drugs in the form of tablets, capsules, powder-injections, large volume injections, and other various forms. It primarily operates under the JH1912, JH ROYAL, 3502, Qiangren, Fulong, 3539, 3537, 3517, 3523, Lingshi, Shenxingtaibao, Cruiser, 3534, Kaihuang, Youyuan, and Qiwu brand names. The company is based in Beijing, China. Jihua Group Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of Xinxing Cathay International Group Co., Ltd.
